comments.body:
Code LGTM. Thanks!

---

Hum, we don’t actually have any test of `inspect` succeeding, it seems. (There is one in system tests.) It would be nice to add one to `integration/check_test.go` — probably based on some image in `quay.io/libpod` that we would never remove? 

I don‘t personally feel strongly that adding this test should be blocking.

---

It would also be helpful to update the examples in `skopeo-inspect.1.md`. I suppose that’s not blocking either.

For reference, output format with this PR:
